schema_data.name: Energy Absorption
schema_data.trigger: A spell would deal damage to you.
schema_data.description: You absorb hostile magical energy. Reduce damage from the triggering spell by 3 times the spell's rank.
schema_data.description_snippet: You absorb hostile magical energy, reducing damage from the triggering spell by 3 times the spell's rank.
schema_data.raw_text_block:
ENERGY ABSORPTION
UNCOMMON
ABJURATION
FOCUS 1
WIZARD
Cast [reaction] verbal; Trigger An effect would deal acid, cold, electricity, or fire damage to you.
You gain resistance 15 to acid, cold, electricity, or fire damage from the triggering effect (one type of your choice). The resistance applies only to the triggering effect's initial damage.
Heightened (+1) The resistance increases by 5.

schema_data.name: Augment Summoning
schema_data.description: You bolster a summoned ally. The target summoned creature gains a +1 status bonus to attack rolls and saves for 1 minute.
schema_data.description_snippet: You bolster a summoned ally, granting a +1 status bonus to attack rolls and saves for 1 minute.
schema_data.raw_text_block:
AUGMENT SUMMONING
UNCOMMON
CONJURATION
FOCUS 1
WIZARD
Cast [free-action]; Requirements You have a summoned creature.
Targets 1 summoned creature you control
Duration 1 minute
You augment the abilities of a summoned creature. The target gains a +1 status bonus to all checks (this also applies to the creature's DCs, including its AC) for the duration of its summoning, up to 1 minute.

schema_data.name: Dimensional Steps
schema_data.description: You flicker through space. Teleport up to 20 feet to a space you can see.
schema_data.description_snippet: You flicker through space, teleporting up to 20 feet to a space you can see.
schema_data.raw_text_block:
DIMENSIONAL STEPS
UNCOMMON
CONJURATION
TELEPORTATION
WIZARD
Cast [one-action] somatic
Range self
You flicker through space. Teleport up to 20 feet to a space you can see.

schema_data.name: Scholastic Dissertation
schema_data.description: You focus your scholarship into a burst of magical clarity, drawing on disciplined study to improve your next Recall Knowledge or spell-identification effort during the duration.
schema_data.description_snippet: You focus your scholarship into magical clarity, improving your next Recall Knowledge or spell-identification effort.
schema_data.raw_text_block:
SCHOLASTIC DISSERTATION
UNCOMMON
DIVINATION
FOCUS 1
WIZARD
Cast [one-action]
Range self; Targets self
Duration 1 minute
You focus your scholarship into a burst of magical clarity, drawing on disciplined study to improve your next Recall Knowledge or spell-identification effort during the duration.

schema_data.name: Charming Words
schema_data.description: You lace your speech with beguiling magic. On a failed Will save, the target becomes temporarily helpful toward you for 1 round.
schema_data.description_snippet: You lace your speech with beguiling magic; on a failed Will save, the target becomes temporarily helpful toward you.
schema_data.raw_text_block:
CHARMING WORDS
UNCOMMON
AUDITORY
ENCHANTMENT
INCAPACITATION
LINGUISTIC
MENTAL
WIZARD
Cast [one-action] verbal
Range 30 feet; Targets 1 creature
Saving Throw Will; Duration until the start of your next turn
You whisper enchanting words to deflect your foe's ire. The target must attempt a Will save.
Critical Success The target is unaffected.
Success The target takes a -1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls and damage rolls against you.
Failure The target can't use hostile actions against you.
Critical Failure The target is stunned 1 and can't use hostile actions against you.

schema_data.name: Dread Aura
schema_data.description: A fearful magical aura surrounds you. Creatures in the aura become frightened 1 on a failed Will save.
schema_data.description_snippet: A fearful magical aura surrounds you, frightening nearby creatures on a failed Will save.
schema_data.raw_text_block:
DREAD AURA
UNCOMMON
AURA
FOCUS 1
ENCHANTMENT
EMOTION
FEAR
MENTAL
WIZARD
Cast [one-action] verbal
Area 30-foot-radius emanation
Duration sustained up to 1 minute
You emit an aura of terror. Foes in the area are frightened 1 and unable to reduce the condition.

schema_data.name: Force Bolt
schema_data.description: You hurl a compact bolt of force. The target takes 1d4 force damage plus your spellcasting ability modifier.
schema_data.description_snippet: You hurl a compact bolt of force, dealing 1d4 force damage plus your spellcasting ability modifier.
schema_data.raw_text_block:
FORCE BOLT
UNCOMMON
EVOCATION
FORCE
WIZARD
Cast [one-action] somatic
Range 30 feet; Targets 1 creature
You fire an unerring dart of force from your fingertips. It automatically hits and deals 1d4+1 force damage to the target.
Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d4+1.

schema_data.name: Warped Terrain
schema_data.description: You twist perception around a small area, making a 5-foot square appear treacherous and count as difficult terrain for creatures that believe the illusion.
schema_data.description_snippet: You twist perception around a small area, making a 5-foot square appear treacherous and act as difficult terrain.
schema_data.raw_text_block:
WARPED TERRAIN
UNCOMMON
ILLUSION
VISUAL
FOCUS 1
WIZARD
Cast [one-action] to [three-actions] somatic, verbal
Range 60 feet; Area 5-foot burst or more
Duration 1 minute
You create illusory hazards that cover all surfaces in the area (typically the ground). Any creature moving through the illusion treats the squares as difficult terrain. A creature can attempt to disbelieve the effect as normal after using a Seek action or otherwise spending actions interacting with the illusion. If it successfully disbelieves, it ignores the effect for the remaining duration. For each additional action you use casting the spell, the burst's radius increases by 5 feet, to a maximum of 10 extra feet for 3 actions.
Heightened (4th) You can make the illusion appear in the air rather than on a surface, causing it to function as difficult terrain for flying creatures.

schema_data.name: Call of the Grave
schema_data.description: You beckon with the chill of the grave. On a failed Fortitude save, the target becomes sickened 1.
schema_data.description_snippet: You beckon with the chill of the grave; on a failed Fortitude save, the target becomes sickened 1.
schema_data.raw_text_block:
CALL OF THE GRAVE
UNCOMMON
FOCUS 1
ATTACK
NECROMANCY
AUDITORY
MENTAL
WIZARD
Cast [two-actions] somatic, verbal
Range 30 feet; Targets 1 living creature
You fire a ray of sickening energy. Make a spell attack roll.
Critical Success The target becomes sickened 2 and slowed 1 as long as it's sickened.
Success The target becomes sickened 1.
Failure The target is unaffected.
